subject: [LSF/MM/BPF TOPIC][RFC PATCH v4 00/27] Private Memory Nodes (w/ Compressed RAM)

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Proposed a direct conversion of pgdat->private to pgdat->dev_pagemap and suggested using the existing infrastructure. Also discussed the potential benefits of clamping the entire node to ZONE_DEVICE, including freeing up folio flags that track the zone.

2026-03-03.patch_summary: Proposal to introduce Private Memory Nodes (PMNs) with Compressed RAM, allowing for more efficient memory management and potential eviction of pgmap from struct folio/struct page.
